instance_general.subtitle: Configure instance-wide defaults that affect how operator-visible logs are displayed.
instance_general.censor_body: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.
instance_general.shortcuts_body: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. This is off by default.
instance_general.backup_body: Configure how long to keep automatic database backups at each tier. Daily backups are kept in full, then thinned to one per week and one per month. Backups are compressed with gzip.
instance_general.feedback_body: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to Paperclip Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
instance_general.feedback_prompt_hint: No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.
instance_general.feedback_dont_allow_des: Keep voted AI outputs local only.
instance_general.feedback_retest_before: To retest the first-use prompt in local dev, remove the
instance_general.feedback_retest_after: JSON row for this instance, or set it back to
instance_general.feedback_retest_tail: Unset and "prompt" both mean no default has been chosen yet.
instance_general.language_body: Select the display language for the Paperclip interface.
instance_general.sign_out_body: Sign out of this Paperclip instance. You will be redirected to the login page.
workspace_detail.intro: Configure the concrete runtime workspace that Paperclip reuses for this issue flow.
workspace_detail.intro_extended: These settings stay attached to the execution workspace so future runs can keep local paths, repo refs, provisioning, teardown, and runtime-service behavior in sync with the actual workspace being reused.
workspace_detail.workspace_settings_body: Edit the concrete path, repo, branch, provisioning, teardown, and runtime overrides attached to this execution workspace.
workspace_detail.provision_command_hint: Runs when Paperclip prepares this execution workspace
workspace_detail.teardown_command_hint: Runs when the execution workspace is archived or cleaned up
workspace_detail.runtime_source_executio: This execution workspace currently overrides the project workspace runtime config.
workspace_detail.runtime_source_project: This execution workspace is inheriting the project workspace runtime config.
workspace_detail.runtime_source_none: No runtime config is currently defined on this execution workspace or its project workspace.
workspace_detail.runtime_services_json_h: Concrete workspace runtime settings for this execution workspace. Leave this inheriting unless you need a one-off override. If you are missing the right commands, ask your CEO to set them up for you.
workspace_detail.no_runtime_services_run: No runtime services are currently running for this execution workspace.
workspace_detail.no_runtime_config: No runtime config is defined for this execution workspace yet.
workspace_detail.no_operations: No workspace operations have been recorded yet.

routines.empty: No routines yet. Use Create routine to define the first recurring workflow.
routines.created_body_live: Add the first trigger to turn it into a live workflow.
routines.created_body_draft: Draft saved. Add a default agent before enabling automation.
routines.update_failed_body: Paperclip could not update the routine.
routines.run_failed_body: Paperclip could not start the routine run.
routines.default_agent_required_body: Set a default agent before enabling routine automation.
routines.new_routine_body: Define the recurring work first. Default project and agent are optional for draft routines.
routines.advanced_settings_body: Keep policy controls secondary to the work definition.
routines.policy.coalesce_if_active: If a run is already active, keep just one follow-up run queued.
routines.policy.always_enqueue: Queue every trigger occurrence, even if the routine is already running.
routines.policy.skip_if_active: Drop new trigger occurrences while a run is still active.
routines.policy.skip_missed: Ignore windows that were missed while the scheduler or routine was paused.
routines.policy.enqueue_missed_with_cap: Catch up missed schedule windows in capped batches after recovery.
routines.footer_hint: After creation, Paperclip takes you straight to trigger setup. Draft routines stay paused until you add a default agent.

routine_variables.prompt_hint: Prompt the user for this value before each manual run.

path_instructions.title: How to get a full path
path_instructions.mac_step_1: Open Finder and navigate to the folder.
path_instructions.mac_step_3: Hold the Option (⌥) key — "Copy" changes to "Copy as Pathname".
path_instructions.mac_step_4: Click "Copy as Pathname", then paste here.
path_instructions.mac_tip: You can also open Terminal, type cd, drag the folder into the terminal window, and press Enter. Then type pwd to see the full path.
path_instructions.windows_step_1: Open File Explorer and navigate to the folder.
path_instructions.windows_step_2: Click in the address bar at the top — the full path will appear.
path_instructions.windows_step_3: Copy the path, then paste here.
path_instructions.windows_tip: Alternatively, hold Shift and right-click the folder, then select "Copy as path".
path_instructions.linux_step_1: Open a terminal and navigate to the directory with cd.
path_instructions.linux_step_2: Run pwd to print the full path.
path_instructions.linux_step_3: Copy the output and paste here.
path_instructions.linux_tip: In most file managers, Ctrl+L reveals the full path in the address bar.
